title: Always love, everyday, everyone!
caption: A great R&B song that emerged from a single hook
about: This song also tries to push the track to hit that deep voice sound that makes for awesome R&B most popularized by Barry White.
lyrics:
Always love, everyday, everyone!
Always love, everyday, everyone!!
Always love, every beat, every song!!!

When the night hits us
Remember it’s all about love!
All about love!
All about love!!! 

Always love, everyday, everyone!
Always love, everyday, everyone!!
Always love, every beat, every song!!!

If your day wasn’t what you wanted
There will always be this moment!
Always this moment! (always this moment!)
Always this moment!!! (always this moment!)

Always love, everyday, everyone!
Always love, everyday, everyone!!
Always love, every beat, every song!!!

When someone PUTS you off.
Just remember we all belong! (all belong!)
We all belong!
We all belong!!!

Always love, everyday, everyone!
Always love, everyday, everyone!!
Always love, every beat, every song!!!

When someone does you wrong.
Just remember we can all get along!
Let's get along!
Let's get along!

Always love, everyday, everyone!
Always love, everyday, everyone!!
Always love, every beat, every song!!!

Always love...
Everyday...
Everyone...

Always love...
Every beat...
Every song!!!
